name: Five Nights at Restroom 2
short_description: A comedy horror game in which you try to survive five monsters during five nights in the bathroom of hell while an angel helps you and you find tapes revealing the past of the worst monster in that place: Blunger.
detailed_description:
After a Hell monster killed you, you are falling into the darkest pit of Hell. You felt a stomach ache and go to the restroom.

An Angel call you and say that he will be able to revive you in 5 days. But, you have a problem, there are five monsters trying to kill you, the angel say that he sent they to a cage but one will be free each day.

To survive, you need to use a differnt mechanic with each one of the monsters. To avoid Toiletunny, you need to grab your cell phone, he just want to kill you, not violate your privacy. With Poo Bear you just need to get out of the cabin. Waterchicken will leave when you flush ventilation. Sinkfox is stupid, so when you close the left door, he will get out. And the worst of all: Blunger, close the right door before he kills you.

supported_languages:
English*, Portuguese - Brazil*
*languages with full audio support
